title: Information Density Reduction / Progressive Disclosure
microcopy_removed_or_collapsed: Hoje onboarding cards moved behind a collapsed next-steps disclosure
Hoje failure evidence cards moved behind a single evidence disclosure
Hoje exception reason and attempted alternatives moved behind a compact context disclosure
Agenda day secondary alerts and mode-guidance text moved behind a details disclosure
Atendimento response context moved behind a compact details disclosure on each conversation card
Disponibilidade active block inventory moved behind a single evidence disclosure
Aprovacoes reason and attempted alternatives moved behind a compact disclosure per exception card
Estimativa decision cards now keep title first and hide explanatory body behind evidence disclosures
Configuracoes session summary moved behind a compact summary disclosure
Ajuda quick guide cards and quick topics moved behind expandable sections
evidence_preservation_strategy: Primary decision remains visible on every screen
Secondary evidence moved into native local details-summary disclosures
One-line summaries remain visible when the evidence is collapsed
Collapsed evidence can be reopened locally without backend state
mobile_behavior: New disclosures stack vertically on mobile and keep tap targets above 44px
Reduced always-visible copy shortens card height on narrow widths
No horizontal overflow regression was detected at 320, 375, 480, 768 and 1024 widths
